title: Rydel Delan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:RydelDelan.png]] |name=Rydel Delan |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Sanyassan/Legends|Sanyassan]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|The Atrium|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|White]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Tan |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] {{C|Formerly}}{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Inaldra's Lieutenant to Get Work|Tansarii Point Station}} *[[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|To fully understand your potential, I need to place you in a real combat situation. It's the only way you can truly test yourself.|Rydel Delan, to a spacer|}} '''Rydel Delan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sanyassan/Legends|Sanyassan]] fighter and [[Martial artist/Legends|martial artist]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Ah, the brawling master. I'd like to talk to Rydel.''"
"''Good. I like Rydel...he's so calm. I hear that he used to work for Nym on Lok.|A spacer and [[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]]|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Inaldra's Lieutenant to Get Work|Tansarii Point Station}}}} Rydel Delan was a master of [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapon]] and [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]]. He used to work for the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] for a period of time but he eventually moved to the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he worked out of the close combat training room as the brawling master on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the Bright Jewel system. [[File:Genesis_Red_gang.jpg|thumb|left|220px|The Genesis Red gang]] In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} the Sanyassan hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to deal with a number of problems on the station. Delan first tasked the spacer with thinning down the increasing number of wild creatures in Tansarii Point Station's atrium, [[flit]]s and [[Scyk/Legends|scyks]], that were becoming very aggressive. Later, the spacer helped the local [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] owner, [[Tiarsis]], with a [[Ryzer|bully]] who was scaring away customers. While doing so, the spacer discovered that a group of renegades calling themselves the [[Genesis Red (gang)|Genesis Red]] was planning to sabotage the station. The spacer therefore headed to the lower level of Tansarii Point Station where he fought the saboteurs and prevented them to achieve their insane project.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Tiarsis|Tansarii Point Station}} In fact, the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] had broken through the outer hull of the station, creating a very dangerous situation for its inhabitants. In order to avoid more damage, Rydel asked the spacer to kill the leader of the Genesis Red gang, known himself as [[Genesis Red/Legends|Genesis Red]]. The spacer eventually succeeded in doing so, earning the respect and reconnaissance of Rydel Delan for saving numerous beings in Tansarii Point Station.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Genesis Red Crimelord|Tansarii Point Station}} ==Equipment== Delan used to wear a [[Marauder Reconnaissance Armor|Marauder armor]]. He also owned several old pieces of fighter equipment including a tarnished brawling champion's [[Ring/Legends|ring]], a frayed [[Pit fighting|pit fighter's]] belt and a warp Brawler's [[Bracelet/Legends|bracelet]] one of which he gave to the spacer in thanks for his help. He also carried a [[Sword/Legends|sword]], an [[Axe/Legends|axe]] and a [[Gauntlet vibroblade/Legends|knuckler]] as his own weapons however for killing Genesis Red he gave one to the spacer to show his gratitude. One of Rydel's swords was left behind at a [[Downed Blood Razor's Transport]] on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], only to later be retrieved by a spacer exploring the area.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Rare Melee Weapons Mark II}} ==Behind the scenes== Rydel Delan was a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Rydel Delan was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} He gave the player several optional side quests of varying levels of difficulty. ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Genesis Red Crimelord}} *{{SWGWiki|Melee Weapon Training}} *{{SWGWiki|The Atrium}} *{{SWGWiki|Tiarsis}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Delan, Rydel}} [[Category:Combat instructors and training officers]] [[Category:Lok Revenants]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Martial artists]] [[Category:Sanyassans]] [[Category:Tansarii Point Station residents]]
